description: Enable hosts to add guests by phone number and reach them via SMS invitations and reminders, complementing the existing email-based flow.

userStories.title: Normalize and validate phone numbers with country code support
userStories.description: As a host, I want phone numbers to be normalized to E.164 format when I add guests so that SMS delivery works reliably across international numbers.
acceptanceCriteria: Install a lightweight phone validation library (e.g. libphonenumber-js) and add a `normalizePhone(raw: string, defaultCountry?: string): string | null` utility in `src/lib/phone.ts`
Update `validateGuestInput()` and `validateGuestsArrayInput()` in `src/lib/validation.ts` to use the new normalizer instead of the existing PHONE_RE regex
Store the E.164-normalized value in the `guests.phone` column; reject numbers that cannot be parsed
Update `GuestForm.tsx` to show a country-code selector (default US +1) next to the phone input and display the formatted number as the user types
Update the CSV parser in `src/lib/csvParser.ts` to normalize phone numbers during import, skipping rows with invalid phones and reporting them to the user
TypeScript strict-mode typecheck passes (`npm run build`)
E2E tests in `e2e/` cover: adding a guest with a valid phone, rejecting an invalid phone, CSV import with mixed valid/invalid phones

userStories.title: Send SMS invitations to guests with phone numbers
userStories.description: As a host, I want to send SMS invitations to guests who have a phone number so that guests without email can still receive their RSVP link.
acceptanceCriteria: Integrate Twilio SMS (or a similar provider) by adding a `sendSms(to: string, body: string)` utility in `src/lib/twilio.ts`, reading `TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID`, `TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN`, and `TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER` from environment variables
The SMS utility returns null gracefully when credentials are not configured (matching the pattern in `src/lib/resend.ts`)
Update the invite route at `src/app/api/events/manage/[id]/invite/route.ts` to also send SMS to guests who have a phone number but no email
The SMS body includes: event name, date/time, host name, and the tokenized RSVP link (`/rsvp/{token}`)
Guests who have both email and phone receive email only (to avoid duplicate notifications); guests with phone-only receive SMS
The `invited_at` timestamp is set for SMS-invited guests the same as email-invited guests
The invite API response includes `{ emailsSent: number, smsSent: number, failed: number }` so the dashboard can display the breakdown
Update the `GuestList.tsx` component to show a phone icon indicator next to guests who were invited via SMS
TypeScript strict-mode typecheck passes (`npm run build`)
E2E tests cover: inviting a phone-only guest triggers SMS path (mock Twilio in tests), inviting a guest with both email and phone sends email only

userStories.title: Send SMS reminders to phone-only guests
userStories.description: As a host, I want to send SMS reminders to guests who only have a phone number so that I can follow up with all pending guests regardless of contact method.
acceptanceCriteria: Update the remind route at `src/app/api/events/manage/[id]/remind/route.ts` to send SMS reminders to pending guests who have a phone but no email, using the `sendSms()` utility from `src/lib/twilio.ts`
The SMS reminder body includes: event name, date/time, a friendly nudge, and the RSVP link
The `reminded_at` timestamp is updated for SMS-reminded guests the same as email-reminded guests
The remind API response includes `{ emailsSent: number, smsSent: number, failed: number }`
The dashboard remind button in `src/components/GuestList.tsx` reflects the combined email + SMS count in its confirmation and success feedback
TypeScript strict-mode typecheck passes (`npm run build`)
E2E tests cover: reminding phone-only pending guests sends SMS, the reminded_at timestamp is updated after SMS send
